---
title: "Reflections on 2023"
date: 2023-12-31
categories: [news]
tags: []
description: "Year in review: research, publications, and projects from 2023"
---

Like last year's reflections post, I'm going to keep this one short and use it as a chance to reflect on what I've been up to over the last 12 months, what I've been working on, research I've contributed to, and hopes for next year.

## Research highlights

This year saw continued work on:
- **Active travel safety**: Contributing to the SaferActive project
- **Open transport tools**: Continued development of the Propensity to Cycle Tool
- **Transport data science**: Teaching and developing the MSc module at Leeds

## Publications

Key publications in 2023 included work on:
- Spatial analysis methods for transport
- Open source software for geographic data
- Active travel infrastructure planning

## Looking ahead to 2024

Next year I hope to:
- Continue growing the Transport Data Science teaching
- Publish more open source tools
- Engage with international collaborators
- Progress research on cycling infrastructure prioritisation

Happy new year!
